zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Courcy於1070年出生在英國奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼時，他的父親Richard de Courcy30歲，母親Wandelmonde25歲。他於大約1092年與Rohais Grandmesnil在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1131年在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Andree, Jacques, Michel, Monique.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Calvados, Loiret, Manche, and Marne called Courcy.
History: Nicolas Lemière dit Courcy from Courcy in Manche, France, married Louise-Geneviève Dubé in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1749.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Courcy was born in 1070, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Richard de Courcy, was 30 and his mother, Wandelmonde, was 25. He married Rohais Grandmesnil about 1092, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1131, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Courcyが1070年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイで生まれた時，父Richard de Courcyは30歳，母Wandelmondeは25歳であった。約1092年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターでRohais Grandmesnilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1131年にイギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Courcy(이)가 1070년 영국 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Courcy(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Wandelmonde(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 Rohais Grandmesnil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1131년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Courcy родился в 1070 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Courcy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Wandelmonde, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Rohais Grandmesnil около 1092 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1131 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Courcy nació en 1070, en Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Courcy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Wandelmonde, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Rohais Grandmesnil aproximadamente 1092, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1131, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
